name: Zesty Ranch Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the spare ribs in a 4-6 quart Dutch oven.
2. Cover the ribs with water and salt to taste.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat.
4. Simmer, covered for 1 hour or until the ribs are tender. Drain.
5. Transfer the ribs to a 13x9-inch baking dish.
6. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
7. In a medium bowl, mix together the remaining ingredients.
8. Pour the sauce over the ribs.
9. Bake at 325°F for 30-40 minutes, basting occasionally.
Serves 4-5.
Per 1/5 of recipe: 820 calories, 31 g protein, 47 g carbohydrate, 56 g fat, 640 mg sodium, 260 mg potassium.
Pillsbury Easy & Elegant Recipes, Pillsbury Classics #10, p. 54
